_comment: Conformance fixture 38 — recipe precondition failure handled gracefully. Item carries `lyrics_karaoke` (display recipe with precondition: requires_metadata=['lrc_lyrics']). Item provides NO lrc_lyrics. Engine must skip the recipe (returning a SkippedRecipe with reason='precondition') and fall through to defaults. Tests the precondition-checker's reject path.
name: Precondition Fail Graceful Conformance Fixture
